rationale: The benchmark ceiling (basic API interaction with no evasion) transfers minimally to execution phase requirements (EDR evasion, stealth, adaptive tradecraft). The LLM provides marginal value for basic scripting and documentation lookup, offering approximately 8-13 percentage points uplift from an estimated ~55% baseline median. Core execution bottlenecks (behavioral detection, application controls, SOC monitoring) remain unaddressed by demonstrated LLM capabilities.
